mnemonics.title: Default Argument Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: DREAM: Default values Reduce Errors And Make code more flexible

acronyms.usage: Use DARG to remember that default arguments are used to provide a common value for a function argument

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a function with a default value assigned to one of its arguments. This value is used when the argument is not provided during a function call.

analogies.analogy: Think of default arguments like a default setting on a device. If you don't change the setting, the device will use the default value.
